title: Knowledge leaf front matter (PRD §3.2)
description: The YAML front matter of one knowledge leaf file; the markdown body below it holds the actual knowledge content. Truth anchor: the world — citation-anchored, human-gated writes only. One leaf per file, so the front matter is the store file and carries schema-version (§3.5). Notation is immutable once any reference cites it; moves happen by new leaf + class-elsewhere redirect, never by renaming in place (§3.5). Cross-reference resolution and tree-index consistency are structural-validator checks (KK-05). Schema evolution is additive-only (§3.5, D-013).

notation.description: Positional within the per-project tree (e.g. "362.1"). Quote it — unquoted it parses as a number.

notes.description: Governance notes required by the build skill: scope/class-here.

including.description: Standing room: candidate topics, not authoritative.

citations.description: REQUIRED — an unsourced claim is not promotable.
